title: NEI (Not Enough Info)
description: NEI (Not Enough Info) is DataPack that can displays useful info. You can toggle them on and off.
body:
**NEI (Not Enough Info)** is DataPack that can displays useful info. You can toggle them on and off.
- Real Life Time
- In Game Time
- In Game Day Ticks
- Weather
- Entity Health
- Coordinates
- Compass
- Light Level


Open main __Display Menu__ with ``/trigger nei``.\
You can toggle options by clicking "**☒**" or "**☐**" and configure the options by clicking "**[​CONFIG]** ".

Add admins with ``/tag <player> add nei_admin`` and open admin menu with ``/trigger nei_admin``.


Suggest me any feature you want to be added.\
Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RZC9aDRT8n).
